html:
📰 每日 AI 新聞 Top 10 · 2026-07-16
1. Japan's Nichirei Hack Triggers Supply Chain Crisis, Threatens KFC and Aeon Operations資安
日本冷鏈龍頭Nichirei遭駭引發供應鏈風暴，KFC、永旺受累
A cyberattack on Japanese frozen food and cold-chain giant Nichirei has halted warehouse and shipping operations, triggering a cascading supply crisis. KFC Japan, Kura Sushi and retailer Aeon are reportedly facing ingredient shortages, with some outlets risking temporary closures.
日本食品與低溫物流巨頭Nichirei遭外部駭客入侵，導致冷藏倉庫與出貨作業中斷，引發供應鏈連鎖反應。日本肯德基、藏壽司與永旺等業者傳出食材短缺，部分門市恐被迫暫停營業。
iThome · 原文連結
2. Microsoft Patches Record 570 Vulnerabilities, Credits AI-Assisted Discovery資安
微軟Patch Tuesday破紀錄修補570個漏洞，歸功AI輔助發現
Microsoft's July Patch Tuesday resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across its product line, with the company saying AI tools helped uncover many of the flaws. The update also caused shutdown and overheating issues on some Dell PCs.
微軟7月例行更新修補創紀錄的570個漏洞，該公司表示AI工具協助發現了其中許多問題。不過此次更新也導致部分Dell電腦出現關機與過熱異常。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
3. RabbitMQ Flaws Could Leak OAuth Keys and Let Attackers Hijack Message Brokers資安
RabbitMQ重大漏洞曝OAuth金鑰外洩風險，恐遭接管訊息中介伺服器
Security firm Miggo disclosed two RabbitMQ vulnerabilities that could expose OAuth credentials, letting unauthenticated attackers gain administrative control. Versions across the 3.13.x to 4.2.x branches are affected, and users are urged to upgrade immediately.
資安業者Miggo揭露RabbitMQ兩個漏洞，可能導致OAuth驗證資訊外洩，讓未經驗證的攻擊者取得管理權限。3.13.x至4.2.x等分支版本均受影響，用戶應儘速升級。
iThome · 原文連結
4. Thinking Machines Lab Releases Inkling, Its First Open-Weight AI Model模型
Thinking Machines Lab首款開放權重模型Inkling亮相
Thinking Machines Lab unveiled Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter mixture-of-experts model with a 1-million-token context window, trained to understand video and audio. It's available for fine-tuning via the company's Tinker platform, alongside a lighter Inkling-Small preview.
Thinking Machines Lab推出首款開放權重模型Inkling，這是總參數量達9,750億的混合專家模型，支援100萬token脈絡長度並可理解影音內容，即日起可透過Tinker平臺微調，另有輕量版Inkling-Small預覽。
Wired · 原文連結
5. Apple Reportedly in Talks to Acquire an AI Chip Startup產業
傳蘋果洽談收購AI晶片新創公司
The Information reports Apple has been talking to banks and AI chip startups about a possible acquisition, as its in-house AI chip development lags behind the demands of model training and AI applications.
據The Information報導，蘋果為支援AI應用及模型訓練需求，正洽談收購AI晶片新創公司，原因是自研AI晶片進度落後於需求。
iThome · 原文連結
6. Apple Intelligence Approved for Launch in China, Paired With Alibaba's Qwen政策
Apple Intelligence取得中國准入，整合阿里巴巴Qwen模型
Apple's Apple Intelligence has completed the regulatory filing needed to launch in China, with the Chinese version integrating AI capabilities from Alibaba's Qwen and Baidu. A launch date has not yet been announced.
蘋果的Apple Intelligence已完成在中國提供服務所需的備案程序，中國版將整合阿里巴巴Qwen與百度的AI模型能力，但尚未公布上線時間。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
7. Meet GPT-Red, OpenAI's LLM Super-Hacker Built to Make Its Models Safer研究
OpenAI打造LLM超級黑客GPT-Red，用來強化模型安全性
OpenAI built an automated red-teaming system called GPT-Red that acts as a sparring partner to help its models improve defenses against cyberattacks. The company says training against GPT-Red made its newest flagship model, GPT-5.6, its most robust yet.
OpenAI打造自動化紅隊系統GPT-Red，作為訓練夥伴協助自家模型強化對抗網路攻擊的防禦能力。該公司表示，以GPT-Red訓練後，最新旗艦模型GPT-5.6成為其防護表現最佳的版本。
MIT Technology Review · 原文連結
8. Anthropic and Blackstone Bet Enterprise AI Implementation Is the Next Trillion-Dollar Business產業
Anthropic與Blackstone聯手押注企業AI導入服務為下個兆元市場
Anthropic-backed venture Ode launches with Blackstone, Goldman Sachs and other backers, betting that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises — not just selling models — is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.
Anthropic支持的合資企業Ode正式啟動，並獲Blackstone、高盛等機構支持，押注將工程師直接派駐企業內部而非單純銷售模型，才是加速企業AI導入的關鍵。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
9. DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis Calls for a New AI Standards Body政策
DeepMind執行長Hassabis倡議成立AI標準組織
Google DeepMind co-founder and CEO Demis Hassabis argued the US should establish a new organization to set testing and safety-evaluation standards for frontier AI models, warning that AGI could arrive within just a few years.
Google DeepMind共同創辦人兼執行長Demis Hassabis主張美國應成立新的AI標準組織，建立前沿AI模型的測試與安全評估制度，並警告通用人工智慧可能數年內就會到來。
iThome · 原文連結
10. Hack Exposes How AI Music Generator Suno Scraped Millions of Songs資安
駭客事件揭Suno用YouTube等平臺數百萬歌曲訓練AI音樂模型
Data obtained in a hacking incident reveals AI music generator Suno was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from platforms including YouTube Music, Deezer and Genius, despite the company never disclosing its training data sources.
一起駭客事件取得的資料顯示，AI音樂生成服務Suno曾從YouTube Music、Deezer與Genius等平臺爬取數百萬首歌曲與歌詞用於訓練，而該公司從未公開訓練資料來源。
The Verge · 原文連結
由 AI News Digest 從各家 RSS 自動挑選、翻譯並寄送
